rules.h1: font-heading text-5xl md:text-7xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-primary leading-none
rules.h2: font-heading text-4xl md:text-5xl font-medium text-primary mb-8
rules.caption: font-body text-sm tracking-widest uppercase text-secondary font-semibold

Button.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

variants.outline: border border-primary bg-transparent text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white

Card.style: bg-card text-card-foreground border-none shadow-soft hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300

Input.style: border-b border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:border-primary placeholder:text-muted-foreground
Input.note: Use 'Flushed' style inputs (border-bottom only) for a more elegant look

Header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300

variants.scrolled: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/20 shadow-sm py-4

Gallery.interaction: Lightbox on click, subtle zoom on hover

hero.alt: Luxury Italian Villa with manicured gardens

details.alt: Romantic candlelit setting by the sea

motion.scrolling: Use 'lenis' for smooth scrolling to give a premium weight to the page.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Gold (#BF930F) is used on Dark Green (#112E2E) or White, not on light grey. Use larger font sizes for Gold text.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring in Gold color.
accessibility.aria_labels: Required for all icon buttons (WhatsApp, Menu).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENTATION: Use the `/app/frontend` directory (React + Tailwind + Shadcn).
2. ROUTING: Use React Router. Ensure routes match the legacy URLs if possible (e.g., /contatti, /tour) or set up redirects.
3. BACKEND INTEGRATION: The backend is Flask. You may need to proxy requests from React to Flask (see package.json 'proxy' field) or configure CORS.
4. IMAGE LOADING: Use lazy loading for all images below the fold.
5. WHATSAPP: Add a floating WhatsApp button fixed to the bottom-right (z-index 50).
6. SEO: Use 'react-helmet' or similar to inject title/meta tags for 'Matrimoni Salerno' keywords.
7. CRITICAL: Do not use 'Inter' font. Import 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' in index.css.
8. THEME: Default to Light mode for the content sections, but keep Hero and Footer in Dark mode (Brand Green).
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds; use solid colors or subtle textures.
Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics (generic centered layouts). Use asymmetry.
Use 2x more padding than usual (e.g., p-12, py-24).
Micro-interactions are mandatory for all clickable elements.
